implement.detail: SECURITY assertion layer (BRIEF Phase 10) - asserts what H1-H4 built, adds NO production auth code. (1) capability matrix (3x4 grid + null/unknown fail-closed) + a gate-wiring inventory tying each capability to its route can() gate AND naming the authoritative behavioral suite (structural check is a smoke; the whoami row requires the route to actually call detectAppEditor). (2) self-proving grep gates: no PERMISSIVE-STUB marker + no orphan builder ROLE literal survives in api/src+shared/src+ALL live web source roots (allowlist: jwt shim, migration, session-kind; non-tautology proven by planted probes). (3) cross-org assistant-retrieval isolation - deterministic over the real grounding seam + real FTS (org A cites its fact, never org B's). (4) destructive-action authz asserted server-side (app-sso privileged ops gated) + an HONEST KNOWN-GAP TRIPWIRE for the unauthenticated /api/app-data mutation plane. (5) committed live journey drivers. Two lead fixes folded (assistant-billing invalid role; stale capabilities comment)

test.detail: full api lane green (exit 0; +3 files/+26 tests over H4); 30/30 in tests/security+tests/auth/capabilities after the codex fixes; tsc(src+test) clean, chokepoint clean; grep gate proven non-tautological (it even caught a literal marker in a doc comment). No production code touched

securityWall.detail: gitleaks clean; chokepoint clean; the assertion layer ITSELF is the security wall for the block - grep gates ensure no permissive stub / orphan role survives; the capability matrix is fail-closed; cross-org isolation deterministic. The one HIGH gap it surfaced (unauthenticated /api/app-data writes) is honestly flagged, tripwired, and escalated to the operator - NOT dismissed

liveVerification.detail: BOTH live journeys PASS on the credentialed stack. EDIT JOURNEY (slices/H5/edit-journey-output.txt + .cast): admin whoami true -> explicit opt-in -> REAL patch-run follow-up build (HEAD 4ffba5a7->1ddbdf04) -> preview+approve -> ROLLBACK forward-restore (new head c5ca3c11, auditable) -> a user session CANNOT edit (whoami false + /jobs follow-up 403). REQUEST-CHANGES JOURNEY (slices/H5/request-changes-journey-output.txt): user files with route/screen context -> cross-org filing 404 (injection blocked, live) -> org-admin sees with context -> convert starts a real H1-gated patch run -> status converted+jobId. These also serve as H3's real-patch-run walkthrough + H4's live cross-org proof

freshReview.detail: VERDICT: APPROVE (slices/H5/review-verdict.md) - fresh-context review of the assertion strength

codexSliceReview.detail: gpt-5.4/5.5 read-only: first pass NEEDS-WORK with 1 HIGH (the destructive-action-authz assertion DOCUMENTED-AWAY a real gap: /api/app-data mutations authenticate no caller -> cross-tenant data writes) + 1 MED (weak wiring inventory) + 1 LOW (grep gate web coverage). Fixed: the High reframed HONESTLY as a KNOWN HIGH GAP (docs + HIGH findings entry + a tripwire + top operator escalation; NOT silently fixed - it is a pre-existing served-app-data-plane architecture change across the app estate, a separate axis from the complete H1-H4 layer); MED - whoami row requires the real detectAppEditor call + named behavioral suites; LOW - grep gate scans all web source. Codex re-reviews (codex-review-2 then -3): flag-not-fix accepted as DEFENSIBLE, LOW+MED+the honesty sweep all CLOSED. VERDICT: APPROVE

designAudit.reason: api/test slice; no UI surface (the live journeys exercise the panel edit flow end-to-end)

walkthrough.detail: edit-journey.cast (asciinema of the real admin edit->preview->approve->rollback) + both journey output logs
